summary: Iteration 25: Tested all 5 P0 UI bug fixes. All 5 tests PASSED. Coach dialog fits 800px viewport, custom specialty input works, Bilans/Suivis stat cards clickable, member form review toggle prominent, category dialog has no empty space.

issues: Console warnings about duplicate keys in COLOR_OPTIONS array - same colors repeated (#0A84FF, #30D158, #FFD60A, #FF453A, #64D2FF). Should use index-based keys or deduplicate.
Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in TableBody

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: COLOR_OPTIONS arrays in multiple files have duplicate colors causing React key warnings. Consider using index or unique IDs as keys.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 P0 UI bugs from iteration 25 are fixed and verified. Dialog component now uses inset-0 mx-auto my-auto h-fit approach for proper centering and sizing.

bug_1_coach_dialog_800px.description: Coach dialog fits within 800px viewport with all fields visible

bug_2_custom_specialty_input.description: Custom specialty input works with both + Ajouter button and Enter key

bug_3_bilans_suivis_clickable_cards.description: All 6 stat cards on Bilans/Suivis page are clickable with proper filtering

bug_4_member_form_review_toggle.description: Review toggle is prominently visible with blue background and icon

bug_5_dialog_no_empty_space.description: Dialog uses h-fit and has no excessive empty space
